case_title: WILLIE WONG VS. OGEN N DELEK

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $72.50 SERVED JAN-15-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DELEK, OGEN N

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WILLIE WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OGEN N. DELEK IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, WILLIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DELEK, OGEN N STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,193.15 FILED BY WONG, WILLIE AS TO DEFENDANT DELEK, OGEN N ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
